popularStory.headline: Robert de Beaumont, 1st Earl of Leicester - Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
popularStory.description: Robert de Beaumont, 1st Earl of Leicester (Sometime between 1040 & 1050-5 June 1118), also known as Robert of Meulan, count of Meulan, was a powerful Norman nobleman, one of the Companions of William …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Beaumont於1046年12月6日出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾朋吉奧德莫時，他的父親Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen24歲，母親Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan32歲。他於1096年與Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois在法國阿奎泰結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他於1066年登記服兵役。他於1090年在法國諾門迪艾朋吉奧德莫被列為he succeeded his father as seigneur de beaumont-le-roger, de vieilles et de pont-audemer.。他去世於1118年6月5日在法國諾門迪朋吉奧德莫享年71歲，埋葬在法國o-阿爾培斯洛易萊斯 普雷奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Beaumont于1046年12月6日出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾朋吉奧德莫时，他的父亲Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen24岁，母亲Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan32岁。他于1096年与Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois在法国阿奎泰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他于1066年登记服兵役。他于1090年在法国諾門迪艾朋吉奧德莫被列为he succeeded his father as seigneur de beaumont-le-roger, de vieilles et de pont-audemer.。他去世于1118年6月5日在法国諾門迪朋吉奧德莫享年71岁，埋葬在法国o-阿爾培斯洛易萊斯 普雷奧。

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Beaumont was born on 6 December 1046, in Pont-Audemer, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen, was 24 and his mother, Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan, was 32. He married Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois in 1096, in Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. He registered for military service in 1066. In 1090, at the age of 44, his occupation is listed as he succeeded his father as seigneur de beaumont-le-roger, de vieilles et de pont-audemer. in Pont-Audemer, Eure, Normandy, France. He died on 5 June 1118, in Pont-Audemer, Normandy, France, at the age of 71, and was buried in Les Préaux, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Beaumont est né le 6 décembre 1046, à Pont-Audemer, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois en 1096, à Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1066. En 1090, à l’âge de 44 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est he succeeded his father as seigneur de beaumont-le-roger, de vieilles et de pont-audemer. à Pont-Audemer, Eure, Normandie, France. Il est décédé le 5 juin 1118, à Pont-Audemer, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Les Préaux, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Beaumont am 6. Dezember 1046 in Pont-Audemer, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen 24 und seine Mutter Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan 32. Er hat 1096 in Aquitaine, Frankreich Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er hat sich 1066 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1090, als er 44 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als he succeeded his father as seigneur de beaumont-le-roger, de vieilles et de pont-audemer. in Pont-Audemer, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich aufgeführt. Er starb am 5. Juni 1118 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Pont-Audemer, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Les Préaux, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Beaumont è nato il il 6 dicembre 1046 nel Pont-Audemer, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois nel 1096, nel Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1066. Nel 1090, all'età di 44 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come he succeeded his father as seigneur de beaumont-le-roger, de vieilles et de pont-audemer. nel Pont-Audemer, Eure, Normandie, Francia. Morì il 5 giugno 1118, nel Pont-Audemer, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Les Préaux, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Beaumontが1046年12月6日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアポント-アウデマーで生まれた時，父Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouenは24歳，母Adeline or Adeliza de Meulanは32歳であった。1096年にフランスアクイティアインでElizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandoisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1066年に兵役登録をした。1090年，44歳の時，フランスノーマンディエウアポント-アウデマーでの職業はhe succeeded his father as seigneur de beaumont-le-roger, de vieilles et de pont-audemer.と記録されている。彼は1118年6月5日にフランスノーマンディポント-アウデマーで71歳で死去し，フランスルhoネ-アルペスロイアーレス プルeアウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터 테 카스틀 비w
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Beaumont(이)가 1046년 12월 6일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 폰트-오데머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1096년 프랑스 아키테인에서 Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1066년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1090년, 44세의 나이로 그의 직업은 프랑스 노먼디 우르 폰트-오데머에서 he succeeded his father as seigneur de beaumont-le-roger, de vieilles et de pont-audemer.이었다. 그는 1118년 6월 5일 프랑스 노먼디 폰트-오데머에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 ho니-알프스 로이르 레스 플e오스에 묻혔다.

pt.6 December 1046–5 June 1118: 6 de dezembro de 1046–5 de junho de 1118
pt.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Beaumont nasceu em 6 de dezembro de 1046, em Pont-Audemer, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois em 1096, em Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1066. Em 1090, com 44 anos, sua profissão aparece como he succeeded his father as seigneur de beaumont-le-roger, de vieilles et de pont-audemer. em Pont-Audemer, Eure, Normandie, França. Ele faleceu em 5 de junho de 1118, em Pont-Audemer, Normandie, França, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Les Préaux, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: лисестир т кастл вию, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Beaumont родился 6 декабря 1046 г. в местности понт-аудемир, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois в 1096 г. в местности аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. В 1066 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1090 году, в возрасте 44 лет, работал по профессии he succeeded his father as seigneur de beaumont-le-roger, de vieilles et de pont-audemer. в местности понт-аудемир, эур, норманди, Франция. Он умер 5 июня 1118 г. в местности понт-аудемир, норманди, Франция в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности лесь прeаукс, лоир, рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Beaumont nació el 6 de diciembre de 1046, en Pont-Audemer, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois en 1096, en Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1066. En 1090, a la edad de 44 años, su ocupación registrada era he succeeded his father as seigneur de beaumont-le-roger, de vieilles et de pont-audemer. en Pont-Audemer, Eure, Normandie, Francia. Murió el 5 de junio de 1118, en Pont-Audemer, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Les Préaux, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
